# services.elasticsearch-curator

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.elasticsearch-curator`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.elasticsearch-curator.actionYAML` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | curator action.yaml file contents, alternatively use curator-cli which takes a simple action command |
| `services.elasticsearch-curator.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable elasticsearch curator. |
| `services.elasticsearch-curator.hosts` | `list of string` | a list of elasticsearch hosts to connect to |
| `services.elasticsearch-curator.interval` | `string` | The frequency to run curator, a systemd.time such as 'hourly' |
| `services.elasticsearch-curator.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | the port that elasticsearch is listening on |
